<Heading
  as={"h1"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/bridge-integration"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the current Bridge integration status and information for the organization.
Returns live data from the Bridge API including KYC status and virtual account details.

</ParamsDetails>
